{{documentation}}
This template displays an infobox for [[trinket]].

==Usage==
This template can be used by entering the following onto a relevant trinket page.

<pre>{{Infobox Trinket
|durability = 
|specialeffect = 
|carryweight = 
}}</pre>

==Parameters==
===durability===
The maximum durability of the trinket.

===sepcialeffect===
The special effect of the trinket.

===carryweight===
The weight of the trinket.

{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"durability": {
			"label": "Durability",
			"description": "The maximum durability of the trinket.",
			"example": "500",
			"type": "number",
            "suggested": true
		},
		"specialeffect": {
			"label": "Special Effect",
			"description": "The special effect of the trinket.",
			"example": "Increased MAGIC DAMAGE",
			"type": "string",
            "suggested": true
		},
		"carryweight": {
			"label": "Carry Weight",
			"description": "The weight of the trinket.",
			"example": "2.0",
			"type": "number",
            "suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "Infobox describing a trinket.",
	"paramOrder": [
		"durability",
		"specialeffect",
		"carryweight"
	],
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>
}}

<includeonly>[[Category:Infobox templates|Trinkets]]</includeonly>
